name: Armament Reincarnation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon "Armament Reincarnation Tokens" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 500/DEF 500) up to the number of Equip Spells, and Traps with an effect that equips themselves to a monster, in your GY, then you can destroy as many cards in your Spell & Trap Zone as possible, including this card, then Set as many Equip Spells, and Traps with an effect that equips themselves to a monster, as possible from your GY. These Traps can be activated this turn. For the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon.
eff: Special Summon "Armament Reincarnation Tokens" (Warrior/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 500/DEF 500) up to the number of Equip Spells, and Traps with an effect that equips themselves to a monster, in your GY, then you can destroy as many cards in your Spell & Trap Zone as possible, including this card, then Set as many Equip Spells, and Traps with an effect that equips themselves to a monster, as possible from your GY. These Traps can be activated this turn. For the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon.

mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
